metadata.title: COOJAD-BUGESERA | Koperative ya Banki mu Rwanda ku Bacuruzi Bato
metadata.description: COOJAD-BUGESERA ni koperative ya banki yizewe mu Rwanda itanga inguzanyo z’ubucuruzi, konti zo kwizigamira, n’amahugurwa ku bucuruzi ku rubyiruko n’imishinga mito muri Bugesera.
metadata.keywords: koperative ya banki mu Bugesera, inguzanyo z’ubucuruzi i Nyamata, konti zo kwizigamira, ubufasha ku rubyiruko rwihangira imirimo, serivisi za microfinance
metadata.ogDescription: Koperative ya banki yizewe mu Rwanda ku nguzanyo, kwizigamira no guteza imbere urubyiruko rwihangira imirimo.

homeFaq.a1: COOJAD-BUGESERA itanga inguzanyo z’ubucuruzi, inguzanyo z’ubuhinzi n’ubworozi, konti zo kwizigamira, n’amahugurwa y’ubucuruzi ku rubyiruko n’imishinga mito mu Rwanda.
homeFaq.q2: Ni nde wemerewe gusaba inguzanyo y’ubucuruzi muri COOJAD-BUGESERA?
homeFaq.a2: Urubyiruko rwihangira imirimo n’abafite ubucuruzi mu Rwanda bashobora gusaba inguzanyo y’ubucuruzi igihe bujuje ibisabwa birimo ibyangombwa by’irangamuntu byemewe, ubucuruzi bukora cyangwa umushinga w’ubucuruzi, n’ingwate zisabwa.
homeFaq.a3: COOJAD-BUGESERA iherereye i Nyamata mu Karere ka Bugesera mu Rwanda, ahateganye na gare ya Nyamata ku muhanda w’ishuri rya APEBU.

footer.description: Gutera inkunga igisata cy'abacuruzi no guteza imbere iterambere ry'umuntu mu Rwanda.
footer.address: Imbere ya Parike ya Bisi ya Nyamata, Umuhanda wa Ishuri rya APEBU, Nyamata

hero.subtitle: Shaka inguzanyo z’ubucuruzi, konti zo kwizigamira n’amahugurwa afatika muri COOJAD-BUGESERA, koperative ya banki ifasha urubyiruko rwihangira imirimo i Bugesera mu Rwanda.

visionMission.visionText: Kuba ikigo gito cyo guha inguzanyo (micro-finance) cyiyongera kikaba kandi gitanga uburyo butandukanye bwo gukorera ku mafaranga buhuje n'ibyo abanyamuryango n'abakiriya bakeneye cyane cyane, byibanda ku bakiri bato.
visionMission.missionText: Kugira uruhare mu iterambere ry'Akarere ka Bugesera hakoreshejwe gutanga serivisi za banki zoroshya guhanga imirimo no kunoza imibereho y'abaturage mu rwego rw'ubukungu n'imibereho by'umwihariko ku bakiri bato ndetse n'abaturage muri rusange.
visionMission.action1: Guteza imbere gukusanya no kurinda amadepozito y'abanyamuryango bakora mu bukungu
visionMission.action2: Koroshya kubona inguzanyo no kongera inguzanyo zatanzwe
visionMission.action3: Gutanga uburezi ku mafaranga no guteza imbere gukoresha serivisi za banki

serviceCards.title: Serivisi za Banki Zakubakiye
serviceCards.subtitle: Ibisubizo byuzuye byashyizweho kugira ngo dufatanye urugendo rwawe rwo gucuruza

loans.title: Inguzanyo z'Ubucuruzi
loans.description: Inyungu zihuza n'abacuruzi hamwe n'amategeko yoroshye yo kwishyura.

savings.title: Gahunda zo Kuzigama
savings.description: Ongera ubutunzi bwawe utejwe amahirwe n'inyungu zihuza kandi wigenga.

investment.title: Serivisi zo Gushoramali
investment.description: Amahirwe yo gushoramali yuzuye n'ubujyanama bw'inzobere mu gushaka ubutunzi.

training.title: Amahugurwa mu Bucuruzi
training.description: Wige ubuhanga bwo gutsinda mu rugendo rwawe rwo gucuruza hamwe n'inzobere.

testimonials.title: Ibyo Abanyamuryango Bavuze
testimonials.subtitle: Menya uko COOJAD-BUGESERA yahinduye ubuzima n'ubucuruzi mu Rwanda yose
testimonials.t1Quote: COOJAD-BUGESERA yahinduye ubucuruzi bwanjye. Inzira yo kubona inguzanyo yari yoroshye kandi ikipe yatuje yari ifite ubufasha bwihuse. Ninjiye mu kugira igitekerezo nkagera ku bucuruzi bugenda neza mu mezi 18.
testimonials.t2Quote: Amahugurwa mu bucuruzi yari afite inyigisho nyinshi. Nize ku mafaranga gusa ahubwo no ku buyobozi n'ingamba. Ndabyemeza cyane ku bakiri bato bacuruza.
testimonials.t3Quote: Ikintu cyanyishimije cyane ni uburyo bwuzuye. Bamenye icyerekezo cyanjye kandi batanze ibisubizo byanjye. Ubucuruzi bwanjye bwiyongereye 300% mu myaka ibiri.
testimonials.t4Quote: COOJAD ni ibindi ku banki—ni umufatanyabikorwa mu kuzamuka. Inama yo gushoramali yantumye nkura ubucuruzi bwanjye neza igihe nkagabanya ingaruka. Serivisi idasanzwe!

cta.subtitle: Injira mu bantu magana bacuruza bahinduye inzozi zabo mu bizikorwa na COOJAD-BUGESERA.
cta.features: Nta mafaranga ahishe · Nta gihe kirekire cyo gutegereza · Banki ifite ubunyangamugayo

hero.subtitle: Koperative ya banki ifite inshingano zo kuzamura abacuruzi hakoreshejwe serivisi za banki zigerwaho, ubujyanama, n'ubufatanye mu muryango.
hero.location: Imbere ya Parike ya Bisi ya Nyamata
hero.license: Yemewe na Banki Nkuru y'u Rwanda

story.p1: COOJAD-BUGESERA (Cooperative de la Jeunesse pour l'Auto-Emploi et Développement) yashinzwe n'umuryango wa Leta kugira ngo ufashe abaturage, cyane cyane abakiri bato, kubona serivisi za banki no kunoza imibereho yabo mu bukungu.
story.p1Bold: (Cooperative de la Jeunesse pour l'Auto-Emploi et Développement)
story.p2: Muri Kanama 2008, twabaye ishami ryonyine risigaye rya COOJAD koperative icumi z'umwimerere, dufite abakiriya barenga 9,000. Twemezwa na Rwanda Cooperative Agency (RCA) ku ya 22 Kamena 2009, kandi twakiriye Uruhushya rwo gutanga inguzanyo nto (Micro-finance License No. 337) ryatanzwe na Banki Nkuru y'u Rwanda.
story.p3: Duherereye imbere ya Parike ya Bisi ya Nyamata ku Muhanda wa Ishuri rya APEBU, twiyemeje kurwanya ubukene no kwemeza iterambere ry'ubukungu n'imibereho ku bakiri bato bacuruza hakoreshejwe serivisi za banki n'amahugurwa mu bucuruzi.
story.licensedDesc: Uruhushya rwo gutanga inguzanyo nto No. 337 rwahawe na Banki Nkuru y'u Rwanda, rwatanzwe ku ya 22 Ukwakira 2009

mission.title: Inshingano Zacu
mission.text: Gutanga serivisi za banki zigerwaho kandi zizewe n'amahugurwa mu bucuruzi atera inkunga urubyiruko n'abaturage ba Bugesera kugira ngo bagere ku kwigenga mu bukungu n'iterambere rirambye.

vision.title: Icyerekezo Cyacu
vision.text: Umuryango ukomeye w'Abanyarwanda aho buri mukiri muto ucuruza afite ibikoresho byo mu mafaranga, ubumenyi, n'ubufatanye bukenewe kugira ngo yubake ubucuruzi bugenda neza kandi burambye.

values.title: Ibyo Twizeraho
values.subtitle: Aya mahame ayobora ibyose dukora kandi asobanura uwo turi nk'umuryango
values.rapidityDesc: Serivisi zihuse kandi zinoze zo kuzuza ibyo abanyamuryango n'abakiriya bakeneye.
values.honestyDesc: Dukora mu buryo busobanutse kandi bufite ubunyangamugayo mu bikorwa byacu byose n'imibanire.
values.serviceDeliveryDesc: Ubuhanga mu ibikorwa byose, twemeza ko abanyamuryango banyuze kandi batsinze mu mafaranga.
values.solidarityDesc: Dushyigikira umuryango aho abanyamuryango bafatanya mu kuzamuka no gutera imbere.

timeline.title: Intsinzi n'Iterambere
timeline.y2008Desc: Twabaye ishami ryonyine risigaye rya COOJAD koperative icumi z'umwimerere, dufite abakiriya barenga 9,000.
timeline.y2009Desc: Twemejwe na Rwanda Cooperative Agency (RCA) ku ya 22 Kamena 2009, kandi twakiriye Uruhushya rwo gutanga inguzanyo nto na Banki Nkuru y'u Rwanda.
timeline.y2015Desc: Twaguye ibikorwa byacu n'ibicuruzwa byo mu mafaranga kugira ngo dutange serivisi nziza ku bakiri bato bacuruza n'abacuruzi bato.
timeline.y2026Desc: Turimo dutanga serivisi ku banyamuryango barenga 9,000 hamwe n'ibicuruzwa bitandukanye byo mu mafaranga n'amahugurwa yuzuye mu bucuruzi.

board.title: Abagize Inama y'Ubuyobozi
board.subtitle: Inama yacu y'ubuyobozi ifite ubwitange itanga ubuyobozi n'imiyoborere ya koperative

cta.title: Witeguye Kwinjira mu Muryango Wacu?
cta.subtitle: Ushaka kuzigama, gushoramali, cyangwa gukuza ubucuruzi bwawe, COOJAD-BUGESERA iri hano kugufasha mu rugendo rwawe rwo kugera ku kwigenga mu mafaranga.

hero.badge: Ibisubizo byo mu Mafaranga ku Bantu Bose
hero.subtitle: Ibisubizo byuzuye byo mu mafaranga byashyizweho kugira ngo dufatanye urugendo rwawe rwo gucuruza kandi tugufashe kugera ku ntego zawe z'ubucuruzi.

businessLoans.title: Inguzanyo z'Ubucuruzi
businessLoans.description: Inguzanyo z'ubucuruzi zakozwe ku bacuruzi n'abafite ubucuruzi bashaka gukuza ibikorwa byabo.
businessLoans.feature1: Inguzanyo ziva kuri 50,000 RWF kugeza kuri 20,000,000 RWF
businessLoans.elig2: Ubucuruzi bukora cyangwa umugambi w'ubucuruzi urambuye
businessLoans.elig4: Indangamuntu ifite agaciro n'ikimenyetso cy'aho utuye
businessLoans.step1: Uzuza ifishi yo gusaba hamwe n'umugambi w'ubucuruzi
businessLoans.step2: Guhura n'umukozi w'inguzanyo kugira ngo asuzume

agriLoans.title: Inguzanyo z'Ubuhinzi n'Ubworozi
agriLoans.description: Inkunga ihariye y'amafaranga ku bahinzi n'aborozi kugira ngo bazamure umusaruro w'ubuhinzi.
agriLoans.feature1: Inguzanyo ziva kuri 50,000 RWF kugeza kuri 20,000,000 RWF
agriLoans.feature2: Inyungu: 16% ku mwaka (igipimo cyo hasi ku bikorwa by'ubuhinzi)
agriLoans.step1: Kohereza ifishi yo gusaba hamwe n'amakuru yo ku murima
agriLoans.step2: Gusura umurima kugira ngo hasuzumwe umutungo w'ubuhinzi
agriLoans.step5: Gutanga amafaranga hakurikijwe ibihe no kwishyura

savings.title: Konti zo Kuzigama
savings.description: Ibicuruzwa byinshi byo kuzigama bigufasha kubaka ubutunzi utejwe amahirwe hamwe n'inyungu zihuza.
savings.feature1: Konti y'Amafaranga y'Ishuri - Inyungu: 8-12% ku mwaka
savings.feature2: Konti y'Ibikoresho byo mu Nzu - Igicuruzwa cyo kuzigama cyihariye
savings.feature4: Konti yo Kuzigama y'Abana - Tangira kubaka ubutunzi hakiri kare
savings.step1: Sura ibiro byacu ufite indangamuntu ifite agaciro
savings.step5: Akira igitabo n'amakuru ya konti yawe

specialLoans.title: Inguzanyo Zihariye
specialLoans.description: Inguzanyo zihariye zakozwe ku byo ukeneye - imishahara ibanziriza, amashuri, ibinyabiziga, n'amazu.
specialLoans.elig3: Umukozi ufite umushahara, umunyeshuri, cyangwa nyir'umutungo
specialLoans.step3: Kohereza ifishi yo gusaba hamwe n'ibisabwa
specialLoans.step5: Gutanga amafaranga byihuse nyuma yo kwemeza

cta.title: Witeguye Gutangira?
cta.subtitle: Twandikire uyu munsi kugira ngo wige byinshi ku serivisi zacu n'uko dushobora kugufasha kugera ku ntego zawe z'amafaranga.

hero.subtitle: Ufite ibibazo ku serivisi zacu? Turi hano kugufasha ufate intambwe ikurikira mu gushaka intego zawe z'amafaranga.

info.visitAddress: Imbere ya Parike ya Bisi ya Nyamata
info.visitSubaddress: Umuhanda wa Ishuri rya APEBU, Nyamata

form.title: Dushobora Kugufasha Gute?
form.success: Murakoze! Ubutumwa bwawe bwoherejwe neza. Tuzabwandikira vuba.
form.error: Tubabarire, ntitwashoboye kohereza ubutumwa bwawe ubu. Ongera ugerageze mu kanya.

sidebar.mapAddress: Imbere ya Parike ya Bisi ya Nyamata, Umuhanda wa Ishuri rya APEBU, Nyamata

faq.title: Ibibazo Bisanzwe
faq.subtitle: Ibisubizo byihuse ku bibazo ushobora kuba ufite ku serivisi zacu
faq.q1: Ni ibihe bisabwa kugira ngo ubone inguzanyo z'ubucuruzi?
faq.a1: Ugomba kuba ufite imyaka 18-65, umunyarwanda ufite indangamuntu ifite agaciro, ufite ubucuruzi bukora cyangwa umugambi w'ubucuruzi, umusaruro uhamye, kandi ushobora gutanga ingwate.
faq.q2: Inzira yo kwemeza inguzanyo ifata igihe kingana iki?
faq.a2: Inzira yacu isanzwe yo kwemeza ifata iminsi 5-7 y'akazi kuva ukohereza ifishi. Ifishi zimwe zishobora gutunganywa byihuse bitewe n'uko inyandiko zuzuye.
faq.a3: Inyungu zacu ziva kuri 12% - 18% ku mwaka, bitewe n'umubare w'inguzanyo, igihe, n'uko wemewe. Dutanga inyungu zihuza ku isoko.
faq.a4: Yego! Dutanga amahugurwa yuzuye harimo ibanze mu gucuruza, gucunga amafaranga, kwamamaza, n'ubuyobozi. Reba urupapuro rw'Serivisi kugira ngo ubone amakuru menshi.
faq.q5: Nshobora gufungura konti yo kuzigama kuri mwe?
faq.a5: Byanze bikunze! Dutanga konti zo kuzigama zoroshye hamwe n'inyungu zihuza (8%-12% ku mwaka), nta mafaranga ahishe, n'ibihembo byinyongera. Amafaranga make yo gufungura ni 50,000 RWF.
faq.a6: Ushobora gutangira ukoresheje ifishi yo hejuru cyangwa usure ibiro byacu. Ikipe yacu izagufasha mu nzira yo gusaba.

bottomCta.title: Ufite Ibibazo?
bottomCta.subtitle: Ntutindigite kutwandikira. Ikipe yacu ihoraho iteguye kugufasha mu bibazo byose ku bicuruzwa byacu byo mu mafaranga n'ubufatanye.
